---
title: "Setlist.fm"
type: entity

updated: 2026-04-09
---

A comprehensive database of concert tour dates, venues, and setlists. Setlist.fm aggregates concert information from artists across genres, enabling users and applications to discover tour dates and historical performance data.

**Use in the author's work:** Referenced as the primary data source for [[Artist Monitoring]] and the music component of the [[Interest Tracker]] project.
